title: Session
description: The canonical shape of a Foundation session token — docs/33-DOMAIN-MODEL.md §1.3. Not a stored record: a self-verifying, HMAC-signed payload proving a request genuinely comes from an authenticated Patient Identity, for a bounded window of time (ADR-002, ADR-003, ADR-010, docs/29 §3). See session.md for the wire-format encoding, signing algorithm, and rationale.

patient_id.description: The Patient Identity this session resolves to (docs/33 §1.2, ADR-002). Every authenticated call derives patient_id from this verified field, never from client-supplied input (docs/29 §3, §10).

issued_at.description: The instant this session was minted. Set once, at issuance, never modified.

expires_at.description: The instant this session becomes invalid. No silent renewal (docs/15 "session expiration", ADR-010) — a caller presenting an expired token must re-authenticate from scratch, not receive a refreshed one.
